title: Provide bee pollination services
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide bee pollination services demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess pollination service requirement

pcs.text: Discuss and confirm the pollination services required with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss and confirm the pollination services required with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and confirm the pollination services required with client.

pcs.text: Determine number, location and types of colonies required for crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine number, location and types of colonies required for crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine number, location and types of colonies required for crop.

pcs.text: Confirm state, territory and local government legislative and regulatory and requirements, including biosecurity affecting pollination services
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm state, territory and local government legislative and regulatory and requirements, including biosecurity affecting pollination services?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm state, territory and local government legislative and regulatory and requirements, including biosecurity affecting pollination services.

pcs.text: Assess strength, condition and health of bee colonies for their suitability for use as crop pollinators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess strength, condition and health of bee colonies for their suitability for use as crop pollinators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess strength, condition and health of bee colonies for their suitability for use as crop pollinators.

pcs.text: Assess risk of pollination problems with client and establish process to monitor risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess risk of pollination problems with client and establish process to monitor risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess risk of pollination problems with client and establish process to monitor risk.

pcs.text: Provide technical information to client to support bee performance and maintain health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide technical information to client to support bee performance and maintain health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide technical information to client to support bee performance and maintain health.

pcs.text: Obtain appropriate certificates and permits where bees are to be moved across state borders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain appropriate certificates and permits where bees are to be moved across state borders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain appropriate certificates and permits where bees are to be moved across state borders.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess pollination service requirement

elements.title: Price and formalise agreement for pollination services

pcs.text: Identify resources and calculate costs in providing pollination services
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify resources and calculate costs in providing pollination services?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify resources and calculate costs in providing pollination services.

pcs.text: Confirm with client the price for pollination services
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with client the price for pollination services?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with client the price for pollination services.

pcs.text: Document, confirm and exercise an agreement with client to provide pollination service
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document, confirm and exercise an agreement with client to provide pollination service?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document, confirm and exercise an agreement with client to provide pollination service.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Price and formalise agreement for pollination services

elements.title: Prepare apiary sites and deliver hives to client

pcs.text: Prepare sites for hives according to workplace procedures and client requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare sites for hives according to workplace procedures and client requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare sites for hives according to workplace procedures and client requirements.

pcs.text: Deliver hives to site and set up apiary according to client and workplace procedures, legislative requirements and biosecurity code of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Deliver hives to site and set up apiary according to client and workplace procedures, legislative requirements and biosecurity code of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Deliver hives to site and set up apiary according to client and workplace procedures, legislative requirements and biosecurity code of practice.

pcs.text: Demonstrate strength and condition of hives to client to confirm agreed service has been provided
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Demonstrate strength and condition of hives to client to confirm agreed service has been provided?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Demonstrate strength and condition of hives to client to confirm agreed service has been provided.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare apiary sites and deliver hives to client

elements.title: Monitor pollination performance of bee colonies

pcs.text: Liaise with client on spraying programmes to minimise damage to bees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with client on spraying programmes to minimise damage to bees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with client on spraying programmes to minimise damage to bees.

pcs.text: Monitor crop within appropriate timeframe for evidence of bee foraging and pollination efficiency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor crop within appropriate timeframe for evidence of bee foraging and pollination efficiency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor crop within appropriate timeframe for evidence of bee foraging and pollination efficiency.

pcs.text: Carry out bee husbandry practices to ensure apiary performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out bee husbandry practices to ensure apiary performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out bee husbandry practices to ensure apiary performance.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor pollination performance of bee colonies
